title: Lessard Dental
description: Lessard Dental is a family dental practice located in West Edmonton, offering a wide range of services including cosmetic dentistry, dental implants, orthodontics, and emergency care. The clinic is dedicated to providing personalized care tailored to the unique needs of each patient, ensuring a comfortable experience for individuals of all ages. With a team of experienced dentists, they focus on promoting long-term oral health and beautiful smiles. Lessard Dental welcomes new patients and is committed to making dental visits a positive experience.
